claim: The current S3 candidate is not a complete Tier3 result; it is a Tier2 motion shell with Tier3 static labels.
The waiting goods and transported good cannot match because they are separate objects without a shared gid or event lifecycle.
A single authoritative event trace should drive entities, queue, charts, KPIs and labels.
The camera should frame a bounded active object group and move under master-framing constraints instead of using fixed coordinates.
Before claiming a real Tier3 replay, the canonical U2 versus realism.py handling and laden-motion mismatch must be resolved.
The current truthful fault story is equipment stop-repair-recovery; slot-fault rerouting is not yet a real Tier3 output.
The contest-facing design should explain constraint filtering and score/optimization reasoning, not only animate a target coordinate.
